prompt: An anime illustration of two characters at a desk in a {argument name="setting" default="cozy study overlooking the ocean at sunset"}. In the foreground, a young man in a dark knit sweater sits with his back to the viewer. Facing him is a young woman with {argument name="female character hair" default="long blonde hair"} and {argument name="female character eyes" default="striking, glowing blue eyes"}, wearing an elegant navy and white Victorian dress with a sapphire brooch. Floating between them are exactly 4 glowing holographic spheres connected by faint lines, showing {argument name="hologram theme" default="cosmic and futuristic scenes"}: a swirling galaxy, a golden energy tree, a futuristic control room, and a planet with an energy burst. The desk holds open astronomical journals, a starry mug with steam, a glowing brass lamp, a pocket watch, and a pen. Warm sunset lighting contrasts with the magical blue and gold holograms.
translatedPrompt: 一张动漫插画，描绘了两名角色坐在 {argument name="setting" default="俯瞰大海的温馨书房，时值日落"} 的书桌前。前景中，一名穿着深色针织毛衣的年轻男子背对观众坐着。面对他的是一名年轻女子，她有着 {argument name="female character hair" default="金色长发"} 和 {argument name="female character eyes" default="引人注目的发光蓝眼睛"}，身穿优雅的藏青色与白色维多利亚风格连衣裙，佩戴着蓝宝石胸针。在他们之间漂浮着 4 个发光的、由细线连接的全息球体，展示着 {argument name="hologram theme" default="宇宙与未来主义场景"}：旋转的星系、金色的能量树、未来的控制室以及一颗带有能量爆发的行星。书桌上放着打开的天文日志、一个冒着热气的星空马克杯、一盏发光的黄铜台灯、一块怀表和一支钢笔。温暖的日落光线与神奇的蓝色和金色全息图形成了鲜明对比。

breakdown.creativeCore: 拥有宇宙全息图的动漫学者：生成一个动漫风格场景，描绘两名角色在温馨的日落房间里研究神奇的漂浮全息球体。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
